result.stdout:
Description:
  UnstoppableMango's Type Description Language CLI

Usage:
  um [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  broker                         Manage the tdl broker
  gen, generate <source> <file>  Generate types for the target format
  from <source> <file>           Convert the source format to uml

commands.payload:
Description:
  UnstoppableMango's Type Description Language CLI

Usage:
  um [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  broker                         Manage the tdl broker
  gen, generate <source> <file>  Generate types for the target format
  from <source> <file>           Convert the source format to uml

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage the tdl broker

Usage:
  um broker [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  status   Check the status of the broker
  start    Start the broker
  stop     Stop the broker
  upgrade  Upgrade the broker

result.stdout:
Description:
  Upgrade the broker

Usage:
  um broker upgrade [options]

Options:
  -l, --latest             Upgrade to the latest version
  -v, --version <version>  The version to upgrade to
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Convert the source format to uml

Usage:
  um from <source> [<file>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  The source format
  <file>    The file(s) to convert

Options:
  -2, -t, --to <to>  The target format
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
